data.title: Progressive Web App Integration
data.description: Implementing PWA allows better offline functionality and app-like interactions.
data.technical_spec: HTML5, Service Workers, Web App Manifest

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decomposition of website functionalities into smaller, independent services to improve scalability.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Using CDNs to enhance load times worldwide by distributing content through multiple servers.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Creating a fluid and adaptive layout for optimal viewing experience across various devices.

data.title: Server-Side Rendering (SSR)
data.description: Improving SEO and initial load performance by rendering pages on the server.
